caption: At Granada Airport, a group of people are gathered outdoors on a tarmac under a clear blue sky. In the foreground, two men wearing white polo shirts, black pants, and face masks are positioned near a large white and blue bus. One man walks forward past the bus, while the second man steps out from the vehicle's open door. In the background, other individuals are visible, including some wearing masks and a person in a yellow high-visibility vest. A red sign with white text is positioned near a building in the distance. The bus features various logos, including the Audi rings and the Real Madrid club crest. The text "GRANADA AIRPORT 12:08" is displayed in the lower-left corner of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man in the foreground continues walking to the left, and the man exiting the bus fully steps onto the pavement.
